description: The compliance department has mandated that all documents in the 'Projects' workspace (/default-domain/workspaces/Projects) be updated with standardized regulatory metadata for an upcoming SOX audit. For 'Annual Report 2023', 'Project Proposal', and 'Q3 Status Report', update the Source (dc:source) to 'Regulatory Compliance Division', Rights (dc:rights) to 'RESTRICTED - Internal Use Only - SOX Compliant', and Coverage (dc:coverage) to 'United States - Financial Operations'. Additionally, set the Format (dc:format) for 'Annual Report 2023' to 'PDF/A-1b'. Nuxeo credentials: Administrator / Administrator.

expected_values.dc:rights: RESTRICTED - Internal Use Only - SOX Compliant
